name: Chrysos Corporation Limited
analysis: C79 has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 37% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$6.4300, stop A$5.7915, target A$7.3600 (1.46:1) — then trail it.
